messages.message: Prioritize legal crews, protect connection banks, and cancel only flights with no recovery path.

messages.message: Prioritize legal crews, protect connection banks, and cancel only flights with no recovery path.
Accepting a later Bengaluru slot in exchange for protected Delhi arrival spacing.
We can swap aircraft at Hyderabad and release one Mumbai slot within 30 minutes.
Compensation accepted for delayed passengers; keep the runway sequence fair.
